discussion_posts.name: Fangzhou233
discussion_posts.content:
The last sentence of the description should be: 
You can insert lowercase character at any position and you should not remove any characters. 
So 
pattern "Foba" will match: "FooBar", "FaoBra"; will not match: "FoBaFoBa", "FooBarTest", "Foba"

discussion_posts.name: austinpatton
discussion_posts.content: This problem is tagged as a trie problem, but I don\'t see how a trie can be used to optimize the approach over the straightforward two pointer approach and I don\'t see any posted solutions that do this either. Am I crazy or is the trie tag here incorrect?

discussion_posts.content: \uD83E\uDDD9\u200D\u2642\uFE0F Yoda\'s Wisdom : \u201CMatch the pattern, one capital at a time. Lowercase letters, let them pass.\u201D\n\nhttps://leetcode.com/problems/camelcase-matching/solutions/6715709/camelcase-matching-hidden-the-pattern-is-wt29
